productDisplayName: Baggit Women Aer Jhuti Beige Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 12 cm x 11 cm Created from tough jute with leather trims A flap with a buckle detail securing a pocket with a press button Two main zippered compartments A pocket and six card holder slots in the first compartment A separator in the second compartment Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
